svg.title: Full Anvil verification lifecycle
svg.desc: Sequence diagram across Anvil cloud, agent, and driver SDK: registration mints keypair A, certificate B, fingerprint C, and attestation JWT E signed by cloud key D; the challenge phase uses nonce F and signature G over Control4 IPC, verified offline by the SDK.

g.text: SDK verifies offline — all three must pass
1. attestation (E) checks out against embedded public key (D)
2. certificate (B) hashes to exactly fingerprint (C) named in (E)
3. signature (G) verifies with the public key inside cert (B)
all pass → telemetry flows · any fail → telemetry withheld
